projects.name: InternHunt 9.0
projects.description: Developed the official internship fair platform for InternWare, IITM Janakpuri, designed to connect students with recruiters and internship opportunities through a modern and responsive web experience.

projects.name: Kiwi Pomodoro
projects.description: Developed a modern Pomodoro productivity application featuring a relaxing lo-fi atmosphere, helping users stay focused during study sessions while enjoying music and structured break intervals.

projects.name: Matrix 3.0
projects.description: Developed the official platform for Matrix 3.0, a large-scale tech carnival focused on competitions, innovation, and participant engagement, featuring responsive UI, registration workflows, and payment integration.

projects.name: उMUNg - Fourth Edition
projects.description: Developed the official platform for उMUNg - Fourth Edition, delegate registration workflows, and streamlined event participation experiences for a large-scale Model United Nations conference.
